game: The Murder of Sonic the Hedgehog

v0.1.0-alpha.description:
# Initial Release

- Checks are interactable objects and the running sections
- Items are the inventory items you normally receive
- Option to randomize the train cars into the item pool
v0.1.0-alpha.title: v0.1.0-alpha

v0.1.1-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Fixed certain checks not sending
- Added an autoskip option in the mod settings
- AP Messages now show in-game

Compatible with v0.1.0-alpha worlds
v0.1.1-alpha.title: v0.1.1-alpha

v0.2.0-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Fixed the inventory overflowing
- Fixed Conductor's Car Trash Bin and Library Table not randomizing
- Death link.
  - Incorrect deductions and dying in the THINK sections count as deaths
  - Received deaths either make you restart the THINK section or kick you out of dialog
  - Known Issue: Death Link is messed up during Final Push
- Deduction Sanity, correct (and optionally incorrect) deductions are checks
- Choice Sanity, choices in dialogs are checks (optionally can include missable choices)
v0.2.0-alpha.title: v0.2.0-alpha

v0.2.1-alpha.description:
# Changelog
- Fix car rando not being able to goal

Compatible with v0.2.0-alpha worlds
v0.2.1-alpha.title: v0.2.1-alpha
